name: Sump-Kin
description: A culture built on a foundation of unstoppable beasts, exploited labor, and a masterful command of chemical production—a foul but potent combination that has made them an indispensable, if feared, power in global commerce.

industrial_gothic_meets_swamp_horror.description: A unique cultural aesthetic that combines industrial elements with swamp horror themes.

ruthless_pragmatism.description: A calculated brutality that ensures the Sump-Kin's dominance in global commerce.

chemical_production.description: A masterful command of chemical production that fuels the Sump-Kin's economy.

exploited_labor.description: The systematic exploitation of colonized tribes provides the Sump-Kin with an endless supply of cheap labor.

unstoppable_beasts.description: The Sump-Kin's domestication of massive tortoises and snakes provides them with an unstoppable logistical advantage.

military_prowess.description: The Sump-Kin's military doctrine is rooted in venom, mobility, and psychological terror, making them a formidable force on the battlefield.
